info.title: School MIS API
info.description: High school management information system API built with Laravel.

get.summary: List assessments with pagination and optional included relationships
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of assessments. Use 'includes' parameter to eager load related resources (type, subject, classroom, academicYear, term, grades).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to include. Available: type, subject, classroom, academicYear, term, grades

get.summary: List attendance records with pagination and optional included relationships
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of attendance records. Use 'includes' parameter to eager load related resources (student, classroom).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to include. Available: student, classroom

post.summary: Login and receive a Sanctum token

get.summary: List classes with pagination and optional included relationships
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of classes. Use 'includes' parameter to eager load related resources (classTeacher, students, subjects, enrollments).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to include. Available: classTeacher, students, subjects, enrollments

get.summary: List class subjects and teacher assignments

post.summary: Create a class subject with optional teacher assignments

get.summary: Show a class subject and all teacher assignments

post.summary: Assign or update a teacher on a class subject

patch.summary: Switch the core teacher for a class subject

delete.summary: Unassign a teacher from a class subject

get.summary: List grade entries with pagination and optional included relationships
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of grade entries. Use 'includes' parameter to eager load related resources (assessment, student).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to include. Available: assessment, student

post.summary: Record or update a student grade

get.summary: List all payments with pagination and optional included relationships
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of payments. Use 'includes' parameter to eager load related resources (account, account.student, account.feeStructure, recorder).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to include. Available: account, account.student, account.feeStructure, recorder

post.summary: Record a payment and update fee balance
post.description: Create a new payment record for a student fee account

get.summary: Get a student's fee accounts and payments
Get daily collections grouped by payment method
List all staff members with pagination and optional included relationships
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of staff members. Use 'includes' parameter to eager load related resources (user, roles).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to include. Available: user, roles

post.description: Create a new staff record with optional user account and role assignments

get.summary: List all students with pagination and optional included relationships
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of students. Use 'includes' parameter to eager load related resources (currentClassRoom, guardians, enrollments, feeAccounts).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 10, max 100)

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to include. Available: currentClassRoom, guardians, enrollments, feeAccounts

post.description: Create a new student record with optional guardian associations

tags.name: Class Subjects
tags.description: Subject offerings per class and assigned teachers
